hook.summary: Satisfying ice cream matching gameplay in a tropical setting.
hook.visual_action: A player flicks an ice cream sundae from the bottom of the screen to match it with a cluster at the top, earning coins.

scene_flow: The scene opens on a sandy table with various ice cream sundaes and a 'To-Go Order' sign.
The player launches a pink sundae from the bottom to match one in the center, earning coins.
Successive matches are made with different sundae types, causing the coin counter to increment from 100 to 130.
The gameplay loop continues with smooth animations and a relaxing beach backdrop.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy relaxing matching puzzles with a dessert or food theme.
